name: Teams Meeting Notes
description: Generates structured meeting notes, action items, and decision logs from Teams meeting transcripts. Ask me to summarize a meeting, extract action items, or list decisions made.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Summarize my 2pm meeting today and list the action items
What decisions were made in the product roadmap meeting on March 10th?
Save the notes from today's standup to our project SharePoint site
